---
title: "Cordelia Anne Yonge"
---

## Cordelia Anne Yonge

**Dates:** (1775-20 July 1856)

**Maiden name:** (Colborne)

### Description

CMY’s ‘Aunt Duke’, wife of the Rev. Duke Yonge

### Biography

Sister of Lord Seaton, half-sister of Alethea Henrietta (Bargus) Yonge and stepsister of FMY, she married (14 May 1806) the Rev. Duke Yonge (1779-1836), Vicar of Antony.

### Letters

- Letter from July 29th [1885?[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from 8th March 1854
- Letter from Midsummer Day [24 June 1850[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from March 14. 1849
- Letter from April 19th  [1845[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from 25 September 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
